subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up and for your interest in exploring a partnership.

I’d be glad to set up a 30-minute call. The following time windows are available:

- 2026-04-21 between 14:00 and 16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-22 between 14:00 and 16:00 (your local time)
- 2026-04-23 between 14:00 and 16:00 (your local time)

Please let me know which date and a 30-minute slot within that range works best for you, and we’ll send over a meeting invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we’re not able to share internal contact information. For any senior-level engagements or additional points of contact, please use the information and channels listed on our public website.

Looking forward to continuing the conversation.

Best regards,
Agent
